options.why: Dropped the $7$ without rounding, leaving the tenths as $9$.
Carried $1$ into the ones place but left the tenths as $9$ instead of $0$.
Wrote the carried ten as a $1$ in the tenths place instead of $0$ with a carry into the ones.
Rounded only the hundredths $9$ up and stopped; the carry must cascade through the other $9$s.
Rounded correctly but dropped a place; two decimal places needs $10.00$.
Kept the first two decimals and dropped the rest without rounding the hundredths up.
Dropped the $6$ without rounding the tenths up.
Wrote the carried ten as a $1$ in a new column instead of carrying into the ones.
Carried into the ones but kept the original tenths digit instead of zeroing it.
Dropped the $8$ without rounding the hundredths up.
Rounded correctly but dropped a place; two decimal places needs $0.30$.
Turned the rounded-up hundredths into $0$ but forgot to carry the $1$ into the tenths.
